Precondition: Both end effectors grasp nothing; box_1 is on top of box_2; red box remains uncontacted except as required for grasping.
Postcondition: box_1 is grasped with dual-arm symmetric contact on left & right; box_2 top is unblocked.

Precondition: box_1 is grasped; table top is available; red box remains uncontacted except as required for placing.
Postcondition: box_1 is placed on the table top; both end effectors are free.

Precondition: Both end effectors grasp nothing; box_2 is accessible from left & right; red box is not on top of box_2 and remains uncontacted.
Postcondition: box_2 is grasped with dual-arm symmetric contact on left & right.
